mapper.insert:
/* 예측PV발전량 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_predict_pv_gen ( site_id, device_id, std_date, gen_val, temp, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.genVal}, #{entity.temp}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* 예측PV발전량 수정 */ UPDATE tb_predict_pv_gen
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
device_id = #{entity.deviceId},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
gen_val = #{entity.genVal},
temp = #{entity.temp},
mod_date = NOW(),
WHERE pre_pv_gen_idx = #{entity.prePvGenIdx}
mapper.select: /* 예측PV발전량 상세조회 */ SELECT pre_pv_gen_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, gen_val, temp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_pv_gen WHERE pre_pv_gen_idx = #{prePvGenIdx}

/* 예측PV발전량 목록조회 */ SELECT pre_pv_gen_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, gen_val, temp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_pv_gen
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* 마지막 예측PV발전량 상세조회 */ SELECT pre_pv_gen_idx, site_id, device_id, std_date, gen_val, temp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_predict_pv_gen WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY std_date DESC LIMIT 1
